arts.ttl: One standout star wins Real Madrid’s player of the month award for January
arts.sum: The first month of the year is well and truly behind us and what a month it has been for Real Madrid. The team lost just one match all month…

arts.ttl: 'I formed strong partnership with Liverpool star – Real Madrid move wouldn't shock me'
arts.sum: Virgil van Dijk is out of contract at the end of the season and is yet to sign a new deal, with the likes of Real Madrid and Bayern Munich reportedly interested in the Dutchman

arts.ttl: Real Madrid XI vs Leganes – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Real Madrid make the short trip to Leganes in the Copa del Rey quarter-finals tonight. The Spanish champions take on their city rivals in cup competition with a place in the last four at stake. Carlo Ancelotti will demand a response from his side after the club’s 1-0 defeat at Espanyol at the weekend. arts.ttl: Real Madrid sent Xabi Alonso warning as Serie A giants eye Carlo Ancelotti
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen fire a warning to Real Madrid over their interest in hiring manager Xabi Alonso to replace Roma target Carlo Ancelotti.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid: Carlo Ancelotti declares ‘EMERGENCY SITUATION’
arts.sum: We have Jacobo, we have Asencio, and we have Tchouameni that we could play at centre-back,” Ancelotti said before focusing on the France international. So bad is the situation at Real Madrid that Fede Valverde had even been tipped as a centre-back option as Aurelien Tchouameni has come in for criticism when playing that role.

arts.ttl: Alphonso Davies agent explains why left-back turned down Real Madrid for Bayern Munich
arts.sum: The agent of Alphonso Davies, Nedal Huoseh, has confirmed that he was in talks over a move to Real Madrid until recently, one of five clubs that were ‘serious’ about their interest in his client. On Tuesday the Bayern Munich left-back committed his future to the Bavarian giants on a long-term contract until 2030, after […] The post Alphonso Davies agent explains why left-back turned down Real Madrid for Bayern Munich appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Premier League side made late bid to sign Real Madrid starlet
arts.sum: Real Madrid had another quiet January transfer window, despite the very noisy demands from the local press to make signings. There were no outgoings from the Santiago Bernabeu, but Los Blancos did receive a late bid for one of their fringe players. Young forward Endrick Felipe has been restricted to morsels of games for the […] The post Premier League side made late bid to sign Real Madrid starlet appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Head of Referees responds to Real Madrid – ‘We might be bad or inept, but we’re not corrupt’
arts.sum: The President of the Referees Committee (CTA) Luis Medina Cantalejo has come out to deny Real Madrid’s allegations made about the officials in Spain, following their open letter to the President of the Royal Spanish Football Federation (RFEF) Rafael Louzan. In the letter, the referees in Spain are accused of being corrupt and robbing Los […] The post Head of Referees responds to Real Madrid – ‘We might be bad or inept, but we’re not corrupt’ appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid issues emotional message to Cristiano Ronaldo
arts.sum: His nine seasons with 451 goals - making him the club’s all-time top scorer – and his 16 titles, including 4 Champions League, 3 Club World Cups, 3 UEFA Super Cups, 2 La Ligas, 2 Copa del Rey, and 2 Spanish Super Cups, along with countless individual accolades and records, have cemented him as part of Real Madrid’s identity. Considered by many as the best footballer of all time and an extraordinary athlete, Ronaldo “will always be remembered as one of the great symbols of its history,” in the words of Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Leganes vs Real Madrid: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid travel to Leganes in Wednesday's Copa del Rey quarter-final. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups and more.
